data.title: Zacatecas Silver grants 2.55M stock options and 3M restricted share units to employees.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 28, 2026, Zacatecas Silver Corp. (TSXV: ZAC; OTC: ZCTSF; FSE: 7TV) disclosed the issuance of 2,550,000 incentive stock options ("Options") and 3,000,000 restricted share units ("RSUs") to its key personnel and consultants.

data.title: Logitech files Form 10-Q for quarter, includes financial information. Switz. & San Jose.
data.description: In collaboration with the headquarters in Lausanne, Switzerland, Logitech has filed its quarterly report on Form 10-Q in San Jose, California. This strategic move aims to provide stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance and operations. The filing includes essential numbers such as revenue, expenses, and profits for the quarter. This transparent action underscores Logitech's commitment to maintaining open communication with investors and regulatory authorities.

data.title: Contio launches MeetingOS in Boise, Idaho, world's first Decision Acceleration Platform, using AI to enhance meetings.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, Contio has introduced MeetingOS, a revolutionary Decision Acceleration Platform, leveraging artificial intelligence to transform meetings into effective decision-making opportunities. This innovative tool marks a significant advancement in the industry as the first of its kind globally.

data.title: Waton Financial Limited (NASDAQ: WTF) announces unaudited financial results for the first six months of FY2026 ending Sep 30, 2025.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 28, 2026, Waton Financial Limited (NASDAQ: WTF), a company offering securities brokerage and financial technology services, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the initial six months concluding on September 30, 2025, marking the commencement of fiscal year 2026.

data.title: LG Electronics will introduce new compressor and motor technologies at AHR Expo 2026 to improve performance and efficiency.
data.description: LG Electronics has announced the unveiling of advanced compressor and motor technologies at the upcoming AHR Expo 2026. The new technologies aim to boost performance and efficiency by introducing innovative changes in structure, movement, and positioning. These updates showcase LG's commitment to pushing boundaries in technological advancements within the industry. Attendees can expect to witness a redefined design approach that enhances overall functionality. LG's display at the expo will provide insights into how these cutting-edge technologies can revolutionize the sector. This development signifies a significant step forward in the evolution of compressors and motors, with the potential to set new standards in the field.

data.title: Nona Biosciences co-founds "Innovative Alliance for Translational Medicine in Immunological Diseases" in Cambridge, MA.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Cambridge, Massachusetts, Nona Biosciences, a key co-founder and organizer, was involved in the establishment of the "Innovative Alliance for Translational Medicine in Immunological Diseases" (referred to as the "Alliance"). The inauguration ceremony was attended by leaders in the field.

data.title: K2 Capital Acquisition Corp prices upsized IPO at $120M for 12M units at $10/unit; to trade on Nasdaq as KTWOU on Jan 29.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, K2 Capital Acquisition Corporation disclosed the new pricing for its enlarged initial public offering, which now consists of 12,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right to obtain one-fifth of one Class A ordinary share upon the closure of the Company's initial business merger. These units are set to be available for trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the "KTWOU" ticker starting January 29, 2026. Following the commencement of separate trading of the unit's components, the Company anticipates that the Class A ordinary shares and rights will be listed on Nasdaq using the symbols "KTWO" and "KTWOR," respectively.

data.title: Research at UT Health San Antonio suggests THC and celecoxib pairing can prevent Alzheimer's; boosts cognition - Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: A study conducted in San Antonio on Jan 28, 2026, found that a combination of THC, the main psychoactive component in cannabis, and celecoxib, a drug commonly used for its anti-inflammatory properties, demonstrated enhanced cognitive functions. This research showcases the increasing understanding of the potential medical advantages of THC, with a focus on its neuroprotective abilities. The study's results highlight the significant impact of combining THC with celecoxib in improving cognition.
